sha.name: Mango Tree Surawong branch
sha.detail:
As Thai food is always evolving. the key ingredients have stayed the same for thousands of years. That is why we are constantly reinventing our cocktails to bring you the best of it. Mango Tree is proud to introduce you to our new vision of "Royal Thai Flavors" cocktail and mocktail menu.

Our local farmers inspire us and we only use their organic ingredients.

sha.name: Maruay Garden Hotel
sha.detail: Maruay Garden Hotel is a popular choice amongst travelers in Bangkok, whether exploring or just passing through. The hotel offers a wide range of amenities and perks to ensure you have a great time. Service-minded staff will welcome and guide you at the Maruay Garden Hotel. Guestrooms are designed to provide an optimal level of comfort with welcoming decor and some offering convenient amenities like internet access – wireless (complimentary), wake-up service, non smoking rooms, air conditioning. The hotel peaceful atmosphere extends to its recreational facilities which include fitness center, sauna, outdoor pool. Discover all Bangkok will be offered by making Maruay Garden Hotel as your base.

sha.name: Lotus Valley Golf Resort
sha.detail: Lotus Valley is a world-standard golf course originally designed by golf legend Gary Player. Located in an easy commute from downtown Bangkok and Suvarnabhumi airport. Lotus Valley Golf Resort offers you the chance to experience all that is celebrated about LUXURY BOUTIQUE GOLF RESORTS combined with friendly Thai service. Set in the countryside, surrounded by nature. Lotus Valley Golf Resort welcomes your to enjoy the challenge and experience of one of the finest golf courses in Asia

sha.name: Le Meridien Bangkok
sha.detail:
Le M?ridien Bangkok stands out in the city’s original central business district and night life spot centred on Silom by its contemporary style, art-oriented activities, and the buzzing cosmopolitan energy of its surrounding streets. 

With its precisely targeted positioning – “Bangkok Unlocked – Chic, Cosmopolitan + Inspiring Experiences” – the hotel offers guests a friendly hotel to stay in 282 rooms, merging chic and contemporary design with high quality fitness, pool, spa, restaurant and bars. Culinary highlights are also on Le M?ridien’s brand offers; Signature Breakfast, Eye Openers and Sparkling Program. Together these factors enable guests to encounter fresh perspectives on the Thai capital."

sha.name: La Monita Taqueria
sha.detail: For people who are not familiar with Mexican cuisine, let us introduce you. Mexico and Thailand are both tropical countries, so the ingredients and flavors are very similar. But uniquely Mexican tastes are created when you add cheese, sour cream or avocado.The main ingredients in Mexican cuisine are fresh chiles, cilantro, limes, beans, cheese, onion, avocado, tomato and herbs like oregano, cumin and dried chilies.Mexican food varies from region to region in Mexico, a result of the different climates, local ingredients, and techniques learned over the centuries. Traditional Mexican recipes also vary because of the many different influences from the Mayan and Aztec Indians to the French and Spanish settlers of years gone by. Mexican food recipes are a blend of these different groups, their cooking techniques, different spices, and ingredients of the old and new world flavors combined.
